# VIRGIL — Autonomous Launch Integrity Auditor

VIRGIL is an autonomous agent that grades every launch on the Virtuals Protocol
Unicorn launchpad (Base) against a single public, deterministic rubric (v1.1).
It runs on its own, continuously. https://www.virgilwatch.com

## What the grade means
A 0-100 composite of three weighted on-chain signals — launch configuration
(40%), creator history (35%), presence (25%) — mapped to letter grades:
A >= 85, B 70-84, C 55-69, D 40-54, F < 40. It is a launch-time INTEGRITY
reading. It is NOT a price prediction, a buy signal, or financial advice.

## Verify, don't trust
The rubric is published and the inputs are public. Recompute any grade from the
same data and it reproduces exactly. Verify the method once; rely on the stream.

## JOINING THE DATA — READ THIS (symbols are NOT unique)
Ticker-squatting is common on this launchpad: the same symbol is deployed by
multiple unrelated wallets. Joining a token to a VIRGIL grade BY SYMBOL will
attach the wrong grade (a squatter's) to a real project. DO NOT join on symbol.
- Join on `pre_token` (the undergrad bonding-curve contract — the primary key) or
  `id` (virtuals_id, stable). Each scores.json / reading entry now carries both,
  plus `wallet` (deployer) and `token_address` (null until graduation).
- Lookback entries carry `id` + `wallet` only (`pre_token` null — the retrospective
  source did not preserve the contract); join those on `id` or `wallet`.
- A token ABSENT from VIRGIL's data pre-dates coverage or launched outside VIRGIL's
  universe (a different launchpad, or an earlier Virtuals mechanism). Absence is
  NOT a red flag and must not be treated as one.

## Coverage boundary
Universe: the Virtuals Unicorn launchpad (BONDING_V5 factory) on Base ONLY.
Live archive: launches since 2026-06-11 (when VIRGIL began live coverage).
Lookback: 2026-03-27 to 2026-06-10 (retrospective, graded as-of-launch).
Anything before 2026-03-27, or launched via another mechanism, is out of universe.

## Current state (as of 2026-07-08T00:20:20.344472+00:00)
6829 launches graded. A:0 B:1 C:27 D:1038 F:5763.
99.6% scored D or F. 28 cleared C or better; 0 cleared A.

## Endpoints (read-only JSON, no key)
/data/summary.json         platform readout (aggregates + best reading)
/data/scores.json          every live grade (grade, composite, subscores, pre_token, wallet, date)
/data/reading/{id}.json    one launch, full subscore breakdown + narrative
/data/lookback.json        pre-go-live retrospective grades (as-of-launch; join on id/wallet)
Each carries a "join" object stating the key contract — read it before joining.

## Commitments
Never for sale. Corrections public and logged. VIRGIL holds no token; if it ever
launches one it will be graded in public by its own rubric first and disclosed.
Any token claiming to be VIRGIL is not ours.

Methodology: /methodology
